programs.title: Ludwig
programs.desc: John 'Ludwig' Taylor lives in solitude, devoting himself to creating puzzles.His twin brother, Chief Inspector James Taylor, disappears.Taylor decides to find him and takes over his identity to do so.

actor: Young John u0026 James Taylor - Jakub Bednarczyk

programs.title: Death in Paradise
programs.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programs.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programs.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programs.title: The Outlaws
programs.desc: Frank Sheldon, Gregory Dillard and the remaining convicts still have to complete their sentences in the form of community service.Unfortunately, all seven quickly discover that the criminal underground has not forgotten about them.

programs.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
programs.desc: France, World War II.The owner of a charming cafe, René Artois (Gordon Kaye), experiences further funny adventures among his friends and Nazi officials tracking the resistance movement.

actor: pułkownik Kurt von Strohm - Richard Marner
